name: Loan Artificial Intelligence Corp.
business: Loan Artificial Intelligence Corp. is a developmental stage company focused on mergers, acquisitions, and other financial transactions. The company has not yet implemented its business plan and has generated no revenue for the last two fiscal years. Current operations are limited to seeking potential business combination opportunities.

exposures.sentence: The Hong Technology Group is engaged in the development and commercialization of intelligent hardware and technology-enabled products integrating artificial intelligence software, data analytics, and automated system applications for consumer, enterprise, and industrial use cases.
